ocr_findings.description: The horizontal bar chart ('分野別の出題数') showing per-category question counts (企業活動158, 法務179, セキュリティ349, etc.) is entirely replaced by an image placeholder 'img-0.jpeg'. All numeric data values within the chart are lost from the OCR text.
The sidebar label '序章 — ITパスポート試験の概要と効果的な学習方法' (vertical text on right margin) is not captured in OCR.

reviewer_notes: Continuation of Lesson 00-02 with a bar chart of question counts by category. The chart data (all numeric values per category) is lost as it was embedded in the graphic. The surrounding explanatory text and the '100問中8問は捨て問題' callout box are well-captured. Chart data loss is med severity since the specific numbers (e.g., セキュリティ=349) carry meaning but the surrounding text still explains the trend qualitatively.
